jobs.description:
NOC Overview

NOC (Network Operation Center) is the central command and control center for ‘Transportation Execution’ across the Amazon Supply Chain network supporting multiple geographies like NA, India and EU. It ensures hassle free, timely pick-up and delivery of freight from vendors to Amazon fulfillment centers (FC) and from Amazon FCs to carrier hubs. In case of any exceptions, NOC steps in to resolve the issue and keeps all the stakeholders informed on the proceedings. Along with this tactical problem solving NOC is also charged with understanding trends in network exceptions and then automating processes or proposing process changes to streamline operations. This second aspect involves network monitoring and significant analysis of network data.
Overall, NOC plays a critical role in ensuring the smooth functioning of Amazon transportation and thereby has a direct impact on Amazon’s ability to serve its customers on time.

Purview of a Trans Ops Representative:
A Trans Ops Representative at NOC facilitates flow of information between different stakeholders (Trans Carriers/Hubs/Warehouses) and resolves any potential issues that impacts customer experience and business continuity. Trans Ops Specialist at NOC works across two verticals – Inbound and Outbound operations.
Inbound Operations deals with Vendor/Carrier/FC relationship, ensuring that the freight is picked-up on time and is delivered at FC as per the given appointment. Trans Ops Specialist on Inbound addresses any potential issues occurring during the lifecycle of pick-up to delivery.
Outbound Operations deals with FC/Carrier/Carrier Hub relationship, ensuring that the truck leaves the FC in order to delivery customer orders as per promise. Trans Ops Specialist on Outbound addresses any potential issues occurring during the lifecycle of freight leaving the FC and reaching customer premises.

A Trans Ops Representative provides timely resolution to the issue in hand by researching and querying internal tools and by taking real-time decisions. An ideal candidate should be able to understand the requirements/be able to analyze data and notice trends and be able to drive Customer Experience without compromising on time. The candidate should have the basic understanding of Logistics and should be able to communicate clearly in the written and oral form.

Key job responsibilities
Trans Ops Representative should be able to ideate process improvements and should have the zeal to drive them to conclusion.
Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:

· Communication with external customers (Carriers, Vendors/Suppliers) and internal customers (Retail, Finance, Software Support, Fulfillment Centers)
· Must be able to systematically escalate problems or variance in the information and data to the relevant owners and teams and follow through on the resolutions to ensure they are delivered.
· Excellent communication, both verbal and written as one may be required to create a narrative outlining weekly findings and the variances to goals, and present these finding in a review forum.

Providing real-time customer experience by working in 24*7 operating environment.

· Communication with external customers (Carriers, Vendors/Suppliers) and internal customers (Retail, Finance, Software Support, Fulfillment Centers)

· Excellent communication, both verbal and written as one may be required to create a narrative outlining weekly findings and the variances to goals, and present these finding in a review forum.

Providing real-time customer experience by working in 24*7 operating environment.

jobs.description:
NOC (Network Operations Center) is the central command and control center for ‘Transportation Execution’ across the Amazon Supply Chain network supporting multiple geographies like NA, India and EU. It ensures hassle free, timely pick-up and delivery of freight from vendors to Amazon fulfillment centers (FC) and from Amazon FCs to carrier hubs. In case of any exceptions, NOC steps in to resolve the issue and keeps all the stakeholders informed on the proceedings. Along with this tactical problem solving NOC is also charged with understanding trends in network exceptions and then automating processes or proposing process changes to streamline operations. This second aspect involves network monitoring and significant analysis of network data.
Overall, NOC plays a critical role in ensuring the smooth functioning of Amazon transportation and thereby has a direct impact on Amazon’s ability to serve its customers on time.

Purview of a Trans Ops Specialist
A Trans Ops Specialist at NOC facilitates flow of information between different stakeholders (Trans Carriers/Hubs/Warehouses) and resolves any potential issues that impacts customer experience and business continuity. This role is a part of the centralized Network Operations Centre (NOC) org part of Amazon India. This role is based in Dalian, China and will be required to work for Amazon Japan.


Key job responsibilities
· Communication with external customers (Carriers, Vendors/Suppliers) and internal customers (Retail, Finance, Software Support, Fulfillment Centers)
· Ability to pull data from numerous databases (using Excel, Access, SQL and/or other data management systems) and to perform ad hoc reporting and analysis as needed is a plus.
· Develop and/or understand performance metrics to assist with driving business results.
· Ability to scope out business and functional requirements for the Amazon technology teams who create and enhance the software systems and tools are used by NOC.
· Must be able to quickly understand the business impact of the trends and make decisions that make sense based on available data.
· Must be able to systematically escalate problems or variance in the information and data to the relevant owners and teams and follow through on the resolutions to ensure they are delivered.
· Work within various time constraints to meet critical business needs, while measuring and identifying activities performed.
· Excellent communication, both verbal and written as one may be required to create a narrative outlining weekly findings and the variances to goals, and present these finding in a review forum. Languages proficiency (mandatory) – Japanese.
Providing real-time customer experience by working in 24*7 operating environment (INCLUDING NIGHT SHIFT)

jobs.description:
Job Description for L2 associates

Overview
The L2 associate acts as the primary interface between Amazon and our delivery partners, so to our delivery partners- you ARE Amazon. L2 Associates are expected to identify DP concerns and work on troubleshooting delivery partner issues and provide process improvement suggestions.

Summary of Responsibilities
- Effectively communicate in a clear and professional manner at all times
- Provides/ expedites prompt and efficient service to Amazon customers/ delivery partners
- Effectively manage sensitive cases by reporting up the escalation matrix
- Demonstrate excellent time-management skills
- Maintains or exceeds targeted performance metrics
- Actively seek solutions through logical reasoning and identify trends to suggest process improvements

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Experience working with customers with a passion for delivering exceptional service, or experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities
- Knowledge of cost metrics and ability to drive cost improvements as an enterprise program with operations and other stakeholders
- 10+ years of finance or Budgeting and forecasting experience
- Experience in Excel (including VBA, pivot tables, array functions, power pivots, etc.) and planning tools like Anaplan, Cognos
jobs.description:
Amazon seeks a Finance Analyst to lead function/category specific Financial Planning & Analysis activity. The person would play a key role in driving the function /category agenda and would work as business partner in delivering the business result. The key task would be to help the business in decision support through data analysis and business insight. In Addition, this position supports and partners with various functions within Finance Business Services to develop annual plans, forecast, long term planning, analyze trends, create metrics and scenario analysis to support business decisions.

The Analyst is responsible to drive planning, forecasting and monitoring goal performance in manner that is detailed and reliable for making management decisions. This includes responsibility for financial metrics, reporting, forecasting and analysis. This individual will be an active member of the leadership team. The successful candidate will be strategic, analytical, and have the demonstrated ability to effectively manage the finances of a high-growth business. Save process effort by running standardized and integrated models.

Key job responsibilities
Roles and Responsibilities
• Monthly RO updates for Headcount(HC) changes & Opex estimates
• Coordinate with Business stakeholders to develop OP1/OP2/3YF plans for HC & Opex
• Cognos loads for OP1/OP2/3YF plans for the business
• Monthly P&L reporting & review with Leadership
• Close activities like PO review, accruals review, any re-class entries etc.
• Variance analysis for HC & Opex vs plan and Quarterly guidance.
• Facility cost analysis for variances and coordinating with GREF for future requirements, based on HC requirements for new customer onboarding.
• By customer revenue tracking and reviewing the Status of Unbilled and Past Due
• Maintain the controls on req approvals and tracking
• HC tracking and reporting based on the customer wise HC allocation (essential for customer wise profitability in future)
• Managing the costing for any new customer onboarding
• Build detailed HC capacity planning
• Defining of the assumptions and mechanism used for FinOps Opex allocations in offline management reporting

jobs.description:
会社概要:
アマゾン ウェブ サービス (AWS) では、東京を拠点とするグローバル Marketing Response Center (MRC) チームのメンバーを募集しています。MRCは、リード・デマンドジェネレーションプロセスにおける重要な機能を担い、各種マーケティングイベント、キャンペーン、施策から生成されるリードのプロファイリング、ナーチャリング、クオリフィケーションを通じて、AWSの新規顧客および見込み顧客との関係構築を推進します。

ポジション概要:
インバウンドマーケティングキャンペーンから生成されるリードに対し、電話・メール・チャットを通じたコミュニケーションによるフォローアップとナーチャリングを実施いただきます。

Company Overview:
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is seeking talented individuals to join our Global Marketing Response Center (MRC) team based in Tokyo. The MRC plays a critical role in the lead and demand generation process, driving engagement with AWS's new and prospective customers in Japan through profiling, nurturing, and qualifying marketing leads generated from various marketing events, campaigns, and activities.

Position Overview:
As an MRC Representative, you will follow up and nurture leads generated from inbound marketing campaigns through multi-channel communication including phone calls, emails, and online chats.


Key job responsibilities
主な職務内容:
1. リードフォローアップとクオリフィケーション -
オンライン/オフラインマーケティングキャンペーンから生成されるリードに対し、電話・メール・チャットを活用したタイムリーなフォローアップを実施
顧客のニーズとビジネス機会を的確に把握し、リードのクオリフィケーションを遂行

2. インバウンドリードのナーチャリング活動 -
データベース構築・更新: お客様のクラウドサービスに関する詳細なニーズおよびビジネス機会を把握し、AWSリードデータベースの構築・更新を実施
リード育成: AWSサービスの価値提案や導入事例の紹介を通じて、リードの関心度を高め、理解を深化
情報提供: AWSサービス導入を検討いただくための適切な情報提供により、リードを「認知」から「検討」段階へと進展

3. 高品質リードの創出 -
ナーチャリング活動を通じて、セールスチームが効果的にフォローできる高品質なリードを創出
セールスコンバージョン率の向上に貢献

4. ステークホルダーマネジメント -
マーケティングキャンペーンの目標達成に向け、複数の社内外ステークホルダーと緊密に連携
社内外の顧客満足度を確保しながら業務を遂行

Roles & Responsibilities:
1. Lead Follow-up and Qualification -
Follow up and qualify leads generated from AWS Japan Marketing online/offline events and campaigns through phone calls, emails, and online chats
Accurately identify customer needs and business opportunities to effectively qualify leads

2. Inbound Lead Nurturing Activities -
Database Development: Build and maintain a comprehensive AWS Lead Database by profiling and researching existing leads to create detailed insights into customers' cloud technology needs and sales opportunities
Lead Nurturing: Increase leads' understanding of the AWS portfolio through targeted information sharing, value proposition communication, and relevant use case presentations
Lead Progression: Move leads from warm or minimal interest to active interest, advancing them from the Education stage to Consideration stage

3. High-Quality Lead Generation -
Create higher-value leads through strategic nurture efforts to drive improved sales conversion rates
Enable the sales team to focus on qualified, sales-ready opportunities

4. Stakeholder Collaboration -
Work closely with multiple internal and external stakeholders to achieve campaign goals
Ensure both internal and external customer satisfaction throughout all interactions

About the team
Diverse Experiences
AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS?
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

Inclusive Team Culture
Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.

Mentorship & Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

Work/Life Balance
We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 6+ years of technology sales selling enterprise software, networking, infrastructure, managed hosting services, or cloud computing services experience
- Experience working with, presenting to, and negotiating with C-level executives, IT, lines of business, procurement, finance, legal and internal stakeholders for sizeable commercial/enterprise deals
- 12+ years of work at a technology company as the account and relationship manager of a large global organization experience
- Enterprise Account Management Experience: Proven 10+ years of experience managing and growing large enterprise accounts, with deep understanding of complex procurement processes, stakeholder dynamics, and decision-making frameworks in large organizations
- Cloud and Emerging Technology Expertise: Well-versed in cloud computing solutions, infrastructure offerings, and emerging technologies including Generative AI and machine learning capabilities, with ability to articulate business value and use cases to enterprise customers
jobs.description:
Do you have the business savvy and the technical background necessary to help establish Amazon as a key technology platform provider? Amazon Web Services India Private Limited is leading the next paradigm shift in computing and is looking for world-class candidates to join our enterprise business.

As a GCC Account Manager for AWS India, your responsibilities will include building and driving the strategy to increase AWS adoption and market penetration across Global Capability Centers (GCCs) operating in India. You will be responsible for carrying out global account strategy locally and building long-term business and technology partnerships with these strategic engineering and innovation hubs that shape global cloud architecture.


Key job responsibilities
- Drive Digital Transformation and Cloud Adoption: Lead strategic conversations and sales plays across four key pillars—Internal Digital Transformation, Cloud Migration & Platform Modernization, Data-driven Innovation, and Generative AI—to drive adoption and business value across GCC operations
- Executive Relationship Management: Facilitate regular and deeper executive engagement between GCC India leadership, global parent organization stakeholders, and AWS teams to ensure strong "Top to Top" connectivity and strategic alignment
- Strategic Business Transformation Conversations: Drive regular, strategic, business transformation and roadmap-oriented discussions with GCC Heads, Engineering Leaders, and Center of Excellence (CoE) owners regarding cloud architecture decisions, workload migrations, and innovation initiatives
- Engineering and Product Leadership Engagement: Collaborate with GCC Engineering Heads, Product Development leaders, and Horizontal leaders to drive the success of their Migration/Modernization strategy and ensure technical alignment
- Project Execution and Leadership: Provide guidance and leadership to extended teams, driving execution excellence and ensuring successful delivery of cloud projects and pilots
- Knowledge Sharing and Capability Building: Lead collaboration initiatives including hackathons, immersion days, and tech days to showcase AWS capabilities, build technical mindshare, and accelerate adoption across the organization
- CTO/CIO Evangelism and Pattern Replication: Evangelize with GCC CTO/CIO offices to replicate successful cloud adoption patterns across different Lines of Business (LOBs) and geographies; interface with Product Engineering & Innovation teams to influence global product and platform transformation decisions
- Partner Ecosystem Alignment: Work closely with GSIs and ISVs supporting GCC operations and ensure alignment with global account teams to convert local initiatives into global-scale consumption
- Compliance and Data Sovereignty: Ensure all local operations and cloud implementations comply with Indian data sovereignty, privacy, and regulatory requirements while maintaining global architecture standards
- Multi-Level Stakeholder Engagement: Engage effectively at all levels of the GCC organization, including C-levels, Engineering Heads, and technical architects of both India operations and the global parent organization
- Strategic Coverage Planning: Develop and execute against a comprehensive coverage plan and business objectives, connecting AWS's global account strategy with India's growing GCC ecosystem

A day in the life
As an Account Executive for the GCC practice, the candidate will be the owner of assigned GCC accounts and will focus on driving digital transformation and cloud adoption through meaningful engagement with GCC leaders, Engineering Heads, architects, developers, and global stakeholders. In this role, the candidate will partner closely with AWS global account teams, local partners, and internal stakeholders to represent the entire portfolio of AWS products and services across assigned GCC customer base. The candidate will act as a thought leader, trusted advisor, and local champion who helps influence technology decisions, accelerate cloud workload migrations, and unlock new innovation opportunities that scale globally.
A typical day may include:
- Research and preparation for customer meetings and calls with GCC India leadership, Engineering Heads, and global parent organization stakeholders to ensure strategic alignment and business value discussions
- Collaboration with cross-functional AWS teams (Global Account Managers, Solutions Architects, Professional Services, Partner teams) on pitches, technical demos, and customer engagement strategies
- Executive and technical customer meetings and regular cadence calls with GCC India operations teams and global parent organization leadership to drive cloud adoption roadmaps and transformation initiatives
- Stakeholder mapping and relationship development across GCC India operations, global leadership, and key decision-makers to identify expansion opportunities and influence technology strategies
- Planning and execution of in-person engagement activities such as hackathons, immersion days, and technology showcases to build technical mindshare and accelerate AWS adoption
- Coordination with GSIs, ISVs, and partner ecosystems to ensure alignment on local initiatives and drive conversion to global-scale consumption
- Maintaining high standards of account hygiene in SFDC with clear documentation linking local cloud initiatives, migration projects, and innovation pilots to global consumption metrics and business outcomes


About the team
AWS Global Sales
AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and consistent support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS?
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from all industries trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
Inclusive Team Culture: AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
Mentorship & Career Growth: We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
Work/Life Harmony: We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.

jobs.title: Account Manager - GCC, GCC Practice, AWS India

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Experience building strategic relationships with stakeholders, including communicating and collaborating across teams and functions
- 6+ years of sales or account management experience
- MBA, or experience working in a sales role
jobs.description:
Do you have the business savvy and the technical background necessary to help establish Amazon as a key technology platform provider? Amazon Web Services India Private Limited is leading the next paradigm shift in computing and is looking for world-class candidates to join our enterprise business.
As a GCC Account Manager for AWS India, your responsibilities will include building and driving the strategy to increase AWS adoption and market penetration across Global Capability Centers (GCCs) operating in India. You will be responsible for carrying out global account strategy locally and building long-term business and technology partnerships with these strategic engineering and innovation hubs that shape global cloud architecture.



Key job responsibilities
The candidate would drive A/ Internal Digital Transformation B/ Cloud Migration & Platform Modernization C/ Data-driven Innovation and D/ Generative AI conversations, sales plays and adoption across GCC operations.
The candidate would drive regular and deeper executive engagement between GCC India leadership, global parent organization stakeholders, and AWS teams to ensure "Top to Top" connect from both sides.
The candidate would have the charter of driving regular, strategic, business transformation & roadmap oriented conversations with GCC Heads, Engineering Leaders, and Center of Excellence (CoE) owners with regards to cloud architecture decisions, workload migrations, and innovation initiatives.
The candidate would have the charter of engaging with GCC Engineering Heads, Product Development leaders, and Horizontal leaders to drive success of their Migration/Modernization strategy.
He/she should be able to provide guidance & leadership to the extended teams and drive execution excellence behind the success of projects and Pilots.
The candidate will lead collaboration initiatives including hackathons, immersion days, and tech days to showcase AWS capabilities, build technical mindshare, and accelerate adoption.
The candidate would be able to evangelize with GCC CTO/CIO offices and replicate successful cloud adoption patterns across different Lines of Business (LOBs) and geographies. Also, interface with Product Engineering & Innovation teams to influence global product and platform transformation decisions.
The candidate would work closely with GSIs and ISVs that support GCC operations and ensure alignment with global account teams to convert local initiatives into global-scale consumption.
The candidate would ensure all local operations and cloud implementations follow Indian data sovereignty, privacy, and regulatory requirements while maintaining global architecture standards.
The ideal candidate will possess a key account management or business development background that enables them to engage at all levels of a GCC organization, including C-levels, Engineering Heads, and technical architects of both the India operations and global parent organization.
The candidate will demonstrate a strong technical competency focused on cloud computing, modern application development, and the evolving GCC landscape in India.
The candidate should be a self-starter who is prepared to develop and execute against a coverage plan and business objectives, connecting AWS's global account strategy with India's growing GCC ecosystem.

A day in the life
As an Account Manager for GCC practice, you will be the owner of your assigned GCC accounts and will focus on driving digital transformation and cloud adoption through meaningful engagement with GCC leaders, Engineering Heads, architects, developers, and global stakeholders.
In this role, you will partner closely with AWS global account teams, local partners, and internal stakeholders to represent the entire portfolio of AWS products and services across your assigned GCC customer base. You will act as a thought leader, trusted advisor, and local champion who helps influence technology decisions, accelerate cloud workload migrations, and unlock new innovation opportunities that scale globally.
Research and preparation for the day's customer meetings and calls with GCC leaders and global stakeholders
Collaborate with Cross-functional teams (Global Account Managers, SA, ProServe, Partner teams) on pitches, demos, and technical engagements
Customer meeting(s) and customer cadence calls with GCC India teams and global parent organization
Stakeholder mapping across GCC India operations and global leadership
Plan and execute in-person engagement activities (hackathons, immersion days, tech showcases)
Ensure high standards and maintain SFDC hygiene with clear linkage between local initiatives and global consumption


About the team
AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and consistent support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.
